business.name: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection
business.hours: Mon-Fri 7:30 AM – 5:30 PM, Sat 8 AM – 12 PM

seo.title: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection | Trusted Auto Mechanic in Dallas, TX
seo.description: Expert auto repair and inspection services in Dallas, TX. From brakes to engines, GBG Auto delivers honest, quality service. Call (214) 370-0375.

hero.headline: Expert Auto Repair & Inspections You Can Rely On
hero.subheadline: Honest, high-quality service for your car – from routine maintenance to major repairs.

featureSections.title: Full-Service Auto Repair in Dallas
featureSections.body: From oil changes to engine overhauls, our certified technicians handle it all. We use quality parts and cutting-edge diagnostics to keep your car running smoothly.
featureSections.cardBody: We provide upfront estimates and explain every repair before work begins. No surprises, just honest service.

featureSections.title: State Inspections & More
featureSections.body: We perform Texas state inspections quickly and accurately. Plus, our multi-point vehicle inspection catches small issues before they become costly repairs.
featureSections.cardBody: Regular inspections save you money. We’ll help you create a maintenance schedule tailored to your vehicle and driving habits.

whyChooseUs.title: Certified Technicians
whyChooseUs.description: Our team holds ASE certifications and undergoes continuous training to stay current with the latest automotive technology.

whyChooseUs.title: Honest Communication
whyChooseUs.description: We explain issues in plain English and provide detailed estimates. You’ll never feel pressured into unnecessary repairs.

whyChooseUs.title: Quality Parts Guarantee
whyChooseUs.description: We use OEM and high-quality aftermarket parts backed by warranties. Your car deserves the best.

whyChooseUs.title: Convenient Location
whyChooseUs.description: Located at 110 N Peak St in Dallas, we’re easy to find and offer a comfortable waiting area with free Wi-Fi.

testimonials.quote: GBG Auto has been taking care of my family’s cars for years. They’re honest, fair, and always get the job done right.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.quote: I brought my car in for a state inspection and ended up getting a full tune-up. They explained everything and saved me money in the long run.
testimonials.author: Lisa T.

testimonials.quote: Fast, friendly, and professional. They diagnosed my check engine light quickly and the repair was affordable. Highly recommend!
testimonials.author: James K.

cta.headline: Ready to Get Your Car Serviced?
cta.subheadline: Schedule your appointment online or give us a call. We’re here to help.

servicesPage.intro: At GBG Auto Repair & Inspection, we offer a full range of automotive services to keep your vehicle safe and reliable. From routine maintenance to complex repairs, our team has the expertise to handle it all.

services.title: Engine Diagnostics & Repair
services.shortDescription: Accurate diagnostics and expert engine repair to restore performance and reliability.
services.longDescription: Our advanced diagnostic tools quickly identify engine issues, from check engine lights to performance problems. We then provide a clear repair plan and execute it with precision.
benefits: Restored engine performance and fuel efficiency
Peace of mind with a detailed inspection report

process.title: Computer Scan
process.description: We connect your vehicle to our diagnostic system to retrieve error codes and data.

process.title: Physical Inspection
process.description: Our technician performs a thorough visual and mechanical inspection to confirm the issue.

process.title: Repair & Test
process.description: We complete the necessary repairs and test-drive your vehicle to ensure everything is working perfectly.

faqs.question: How long does an engine diagnostic take?
faqs.answer: Most diagnostics take about 1-2 hours. Repairs may take longer depending on the issue.

faqs.question: Will you provide an estimate before starting work?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We always provide a detailed estimate and get your approval before any repairs.

services.title: Brake Service & Repair
services.shortDescription: Complete brake inspections, pad replacement, rotor resurfacing, and more for safe stopping.
services.longDescription: Your safety depends on your brakes. We inspect every component – pads, rotors, calipers, and lines – and recommend only what’s necessary to restore stopping power.

process.title: Brake Inspection
process.description: We measure pad thickness, rotor condition, and check for leaks or wear.

process.title: Component Replacement
process.description: We replace worn pads, resurface or replace rotors, and service calipers as needed.

process.title: Test Drive & Adjustment
process.description: After repairs, we test the brakes and make final adjustments for optimal feel.

faqs.question: How often should I replace my brake pads?
faqs.answer: Typically every 30,000-50,000 miles, but it depends on driving habits. We’ll check them during any visit.

faqs.question: Do you use OEM or aftermarket parts?
faqs.answer: We use high-quality parts from trusted brands, and we can install OEM parts upon request.

services.title: Oil Change & Fluid Services
services.shortDescription: Keep your engine running smoothly with regular oil changes and fluid checks.
services.longDescription: Regular oil changes are the simplest way to extend your engine’s life. We use quality oils and filters, and top off all essential fluids at no extra charge.
benefits: Complimentary fluid top-off and tire pressure check

process.title: Drain Old Oil
process.description: We safely drain the old oil and dispose of it responsibly.

process.title: Replace Filter & Add New Oil
process.description: We install a new oil filter and fill with the correct grade and amount of oil.

process.title: Fluid Check & Report
process.description: We check all fluid levels and provide a report on your vehicle’s condition.

faqs.question: What type of oil do you use?
faqs.answer: We use conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic oils from major brands. We’ll recommend the best option for your vehicle.

faqs.question: How often should I change my oil?
faqs.answer: Most modern cars need an oil change every 5,000-7,500 miles. Check your owner’s manual or ask our technicians.

services.title: State Inspections & Emissions
services.shortDescription: Quick and accurate Texas state inspections to keep you legal on the road.
services.longDescription: We are a certified Texas inspection station. Our technicians perform the required safety and emissions tests efficiently, so you can get back on the road quickly.
benefits: We can perform minor repairs on the spot if needed

process.title: Safety Check
process.description: We inspect brakes, lights, tires, horn, mirrors, and other safety items.

process.title: Emissions Test
process.description: We connect to your vehicle’s OBD system to verify emissions compliance.

process.title: Pass or Fail Report
process.description: You receive a clear report. If you fail, we explain what’s needed to pass.

faqs.question: What do I need to bring for an inspection?
faqs.answer: Just your vehicle and proof of insurance. We handle the rest.

faqs.question: How long does an inspection take?
faqs.answer: Typically 30-45 minutes. We try to get you in and out quickly.

about.headline: Your Trusted Dallas Auto Repair Shop
about.mission: To provide honest, high-quality auto repair and inspection services that keep our customers safe and their vehicles running reliably.
story: GBG Auto Repair & Inspection was founded in 2005 with a simple mission: treat every customer like family. Over the years, we’ve grown from a small two-bay shop into a full-service auto care center, but our core values remain the same – integrity, transparency, and craftsmanship.

Our team of ASE-certified technicians brings decades of combined experience to every job. We invest in the latest diagnostic equipment and training to ensure we can handle any make or model. Whether it’s a simple oil change or a complex engine rebuild, we treat your car as if it were our own.

coreValues.title: Integrity
coreValues.description: We do the right thing, even when no one is watching. Our recommendations are always in your best interest.

coreValues.title: Quality
coreValues.description: We use top-grade parts and follow manufacturer specifications to ensure lasting repairs.

coreValues.title: Customer Focus
coreValues.description: We listen to your concerns and communicate clearly throughout the repair process.

coreValues.title: Community
coreValues.description: We’re proud to be a local Dallas business and support our neighbors whenever we can.

contact.headline: Get in Touch with GBG Auto
contact.subheadline: Have a question or ready to book? Call us or fill out the form below.
